groundingActions.biggestGap: The room already had good rhythm, but it floated as a generic necromancer study instead of a specific office under Caer Darrow and Scholomance.
groundingActions.enrichment: Named Caer Darrow, Scholomance, the Barov crypt spine, Darrowmere damp, Kirin Tor robe-cut, and Violet Citadel study habits. Sharpened Jandice's threshold handoff with Barov burgundy and reagent-marked hands so the opening reads as academic hierarchy rather than generic gothic staging.

groundingActions.biggestGap: The theorem work was clean but too portable; the plague explanation needed more contact with the actual material world of this story.
groundingActions.enrichment: Anchored the resonance lecture to Barov grain, Andorhal village fallout, specimen jars, alchemical chalk, slate work, and Dalaran ward vocabulary. Kept the proof-seminar cadence intact while making the mechanism feel inseparable from this plague infrastructure.

groundingActions.scene: Ethics duel and higher chain reveal
groundingActions.biggestGap: The argument already landed, but the institutional and geopolitical pressure around it needed more world-bound texture to keep it from reading as abstract philosophy.
groundingActions.enrichment: Brought in the Council of Six, the Violet Citadel, Eastweald, Lordaeron, Barov logistics, Darrowmere, and Northrend so Jaina's objections and Kel'Thuzad's answers stay tied to Dalaran policy, plague deployment, and the real chain above the work.

groundingActions.biggestGap: The ending recognition beat had strong pacing but not enough Scholomance-specific geometry in the room and the ward approach.
groundingActions.enrichment: Grounded the recurrence reveal in ward lines, Caer Darrow stone, and Jaina's copied farmhouse pages, then translated the final approach into flagstone, crypt spine, runic thresholds, and iron-door movement so Sylvanas arrives as a specific learned cadence through hostile architecture rather than a generic interruption.
